settings.label: Final Rest Door Key
settings.description: Determines how you obtain the Final Rest Door Key, which manifests the door in Final Rest, allowing you to challenge Ansem.

settings.label: End of the World Unlock
settings.description:
Determines how you unlock End of the World.

Lucky Emblems: A number of Lucky Emblems are required.

Item: An item called "End of the World" is required.

settings.label: Required Lucky Emblems for End of the World
settings.id: Required Lucky Emblems for End of the World
settings.description: If End of the World Unlock is set to "Lucky Emblems", determines how many Lucky Emblems are required.

settings.label: Required Lucky Emblems for Final Rest Door Key
settings.id: Required Lucky Emblems for Final Rest Door Key
settings.description: If Final Rest Door Key is set to "Lucky Emblems", determines how many Lucky Emblems are required.

settings.label: Lucky Emblems in Item Pool
settings.description:
Determines how many Lucky Emblems are in the item pool.

Has no effect if neither End of the World Unlock nor Final Rest Door Key are set to require Lucky Emblems.

settings.label: Required Postcards
settings.description: If Final Rest Door Key is set to Postcards, determines how many Postcards are required.

settings.label: Required Puppies
settings.description: If Final Rest Door Key is set to Puppies, determines how many Puppies are required.

settings.label: Destiny Islands
settings.description:
If on, adds a Destiny Islands item and a number of Raft Material items to the pool.

When "Destiny Islands" is found, Traverse Town will have the Seashore landing location added.

"Raft Materials" allow progress to Day 2 and Homecoming after collecting an amount specified in your settings.

settings.label: Day 2 Materials
settings.description: Determines the number of Raft Materials required to progress to Day 2.

settings.label: Homecoming Materials
settings.description: Determines the number of Raft Materials required to progress to Homecoming.

settings.label: Materials in Pool
settings.description: Determines the number of Raft Materials in the item pool.

settings.label: Super Bosses
settings.description: Determines if important items can be behind Super Bosses.

settings.label: Atlantica
settings.description: Determines if important items can be found in Atlantica.

settings.label: Cups
settings.description: Determines which, if any, cups can hold important items.

settings.label: 100 Acre Wood
settings.description: Determines if important items can be found in 100 Acre Wood.

settings.label: Jungle Slider
settings.description: Determines if important items can be found in the Jungle Slider minigame.

settings.label: Randomize Emblem Pieces
settings.description: Determines whether the emblem piece checks in Hollow Bastion are randomized.

settings.label: Randomize Postcards
settings.description: Determines whether the postcards should be in their vanilla locations, all randomized, or only postcards that appear in chests should be randomized.

settings.label: Randomize Puppies
settings.description: Determines if puppy locations are randomized.

settings.label: Puppy Value
settings.description: If puppies are randomized, determines how many puppies each "Puppy" item is worth.

settings.label: EXP Multiplier
settings.description: Determines the amount of experience party members need to level up.

settings.label: Level Checks
settings.description: Determines the latest level which can yield rewards on level up.

settings.label: Slot 2 Level Checks
settings.description: Determines the amount of secondary bonuses found on levels.

settings.label: Max Level for Slot 2 Level Checks
settings.id: Max Level for Slot 2 Level Checks
settings.description: Determines the max level which can yield a secondary bonus.

settings.label: Force Stats on Levels Starting at Level
settings.id: Force Stats on Levels Starting at Level
settings.description: Determines at which level only stat increases can be found.

settings.label: Strength Increases
settings.description: Determines how many strength increases are in the item pool.

settings.label: Defense Increases
settings.description: Determines how many defense increases are in the item pool.

settings.label: HP Increases
settings.description: Determines how many HP increases are in the item pool.

settings.label: AP Increases
settings.description: Determines how many AP increases are in the item pool.

settings.label: MP Increases
settings.description: Determines how many MP increases are in the item pool.

settings.label: Accessory Slot Increases
settings.description: Determines how many Accessory Slot increases are in the item pool.

settings.label: Item Slot Increases
settings.description: Determines how many Item Slot increases are in the item pool.

settings.label: Keyblades Unlock Chests
settings.description:
If toggled on, the player is required to have a certain keyblade to open chests in certain worlds.

TT - Lionheart
WL - Lady Luck
OC - Olympia
DJ - Jungle King
AG - Three Wishes
MS - Wishing Star
AL - Crabclaw
HT - Pumpkinhead
NL - Fairy Harp
HB - Divine Rose
EotW - Oblivion
HAW - Spellbinder
DI - Oathkeeper

settings.label: Keyblade Stats
settings.description: Determines if keyblade stats should be shuffled, randomized, or remain vanilla.

settings.label: Bad Starting Weapons
settings.description: Determines if the starting weapons should have their vanilla stats.

settings.label: Keyblade Max STR
settings.description: If Keyblade stats are randomized, determines the Max STR a keyblade can yield.

settings.label: Keyblade Min STR
settings.description: If Keyblade stats are randomized, determines the Min STR a keyblade can yield.

settings.label: Keyblade Max Crit Rate
settings.description: If Keyblade stats are randomized, determines the Max Crit Rate a keyblade can yield.

settings.label: Keyblade Min Crit Rate
settings.description: If Keyblade stats are randomized, determines the Min Crit Rate a keyblade can yield.

settings.label: Keyblade Max Crit Strength
settings.description: If Keyblade stats are randomized, determines the Max Crit Strength bonus a keyblade can yield.

settings.label: Keyblade Min Crit Strength
settings.description: If Keyblade stats are randomized, determines the Min Crit Strength bonus a keyblade can yield.

settings.label: Keyblade Max Recoil
settings.description: If Keyblade stats are randomized, determines the Max Recoil a keyblade can yield.

settings.label: Keyblade Min Recoil
settings.description: If Keyblade stats are randomized, determines the Min Recoil a keyblade can yield.

settings.label: Keyblade Max MP
settings.description: If Keyblade stats are randomized, determines the Max MP a keyblade can yield.

settings.label: Keyblade Min MP
settings.description: If Keyblade stats are randomized, determines the Min MP a keyblade can yield.

settings.label: Accessory Augments
settings.description:
Accessories are assigned special effects in addition to their normal effects.

These can be either positive or negative.

settings.label: Augment Abilities from Pool
settings.description: If accessory augments is on, if an accessory's augment is assigned an ability, that ability can only be found on that accessory.

settings.label: Randomize Party Member Starting Accessories
settings.description: Determines if the 10 starting accessories (normally given to Aladdin, Ariel, Jack, Peter Pan, and Beast) are randomized and distributed amongst all party members randomly.

settings.label: Mythril Price
settings.description: Determines the cost of Mythril in shops.

settings.label: Mythril in Pool
settings.description: Determines the number of Mythril in the item pool.

settings.label: Orichalcum Price
settings.description: Determines the cost of Orichalcum in shops.

settings.label: Orichalcum in Pool
settings.description: Determines the number of Orichalcum in the item pool.

settings.label: Randomize AP Costs
settings.description:
Determines if AP costs for abilities are changed.

Off: No randomization.

Randomize: Ability AP costs will be randomized to the specified max and min.

Shuffle: Ability AP costs will be shuffled amongst themselves.

Distribute: Ability AP costs will be totalled and re-distributed randomly between the specified max and min.

settings.label: Max AP Cost
settings.description: If AP costs are set to "Randomize" or "Distribute", determines the max AP cost an ability can have.

settings.label: Min AP Cost
settings.description: If AP costs are set to "Randomize" or "Distribute", determines the min AP cost an ability can have.

settings.label: Randomize Spell MP Costs
settings.description:
Determines if spell's MP costs are changed.

Off: No randomization.

Randomize: Spell MP costs will be randomized to the specified max and min.

Shuffle: Spell MP costs will be shuffled amongst themselves.

settings.label: Spell MP Cost Min
settings.description: If Spell MP costs are set to "Randomize", determines the min MP cost a spell can have.

settings.label: Spell MP Cost Max
settings.description: If Spell MP costs are set to "Randomize", determines the max MP cost a spell can have.

settings.label: Individual Spell Level Costs
settings.description: If randomizing or shuffling spell MP costs, each individual level of a spell (for example Fire vs Fira vs Firaga) can have different MP costs.

settings.label: Scaling Spell Potency
settings.description: If randomizing or shuffling spell MP costs, each spell will have its effectiveness scaled relative to its new cost.

settings.label: EXP Zero in Pool
settings.description:
Determines if EXP Zero is added to the item pool.

This is redundant if you plan on playing on Proud mode.

settings.label: One HP
settings.description: Forces Sora's max HP to 1 and removes the low health warning sound.

settings.label: 4by3
settings.description: Changes the aspect ratio to 4 by 3.

settings.label: Beep Hack
settings.description: Removes the low health warning sound.

settings.label: Consistent Finishers
settings.description: Makes 30% chance finishers occur 100% of the time.

settings.label: Early Skip
settings.description: Allows skipping cutscenes immediately that normally are unskippable in the first few seconds.

settings.label: Fast Camera
settings.description: Speeds up camera movement and camera centering.

settings.label: Faster Animations
settings.description: Speeds up animations during which you can't play.

settings.label: Unlock 0 Volume
settings.description: Volume 1 mutes the audio channel.

settings.label: Unskippable
settings.description: Makes normally unskippable cutscenes skippable

settings.label: Auto Save
settings.description:
If on, enables auto saving.

L1 + L2 + R1 + R2 + DPad Up: Load most recent auto save.

L1 + L2 + R1 + R2 + DPad Right: Load second most recent auto save.

L1 + L2 + R1 + R2 + DPad Down: Load third most recent auto save.

L1 + L2 + R1 + R2 + DPad Left: Load fourth most recent auto save.

settings.label: Warp Anywhere
settings.description:
Enables the player to warp at any time, even when not at a save point.

L1 + L2 + R2 + Select: Opens the save/warp menu.

settings.label: Slot Name
settings.description:
Defines what the slot name should be for hosting the game using Archipelago.

You can ignore this if you plan to play without using the server/client.

settings.label: Starting Worlds
settings.description: Determines the amount of worlds the player starts with in addition to Traverse Town.

settings.label: Starting Tools
settings.description: Determines if the player should start with Scan and Dodge Roll.

settings.label: Stacking World Items
settings.description:
Determines if world key items should be replaced with additional world items in the pool.

Collecting multiple of a world item grants you that world's key item.

If on, Halloween Town Key Item Bundle is forced on.

WL: Footprints
OC: Entry Pass
DJ: Slides
AL: Crystal Trident
HT: Forget-Me-Not and Jack-In-The-Box
HB: Theon Vol. 6

settings.label: Halloween Town Key Item Bundle
settings.description: Determines if collecting Forget-Me-Not automatically grants the player Jack-In-The-Box.

settings.label: Interact in Battle
settings.description: Determines if the player can interact with objects they normally couldn't in battle.

settings.label: Logic Difficulty
settings.description:
Determines what the randomizer logic may expect you to do to reach certain locations.

Beginner: Logic only expects what would be the natural solution in vanilla gameplay or similar, as well as a guarantee of tools for boss fights.

Normal: Logic expects some clever use of abilities, exploration of options, and competent combat ability; generally does not require advanced knowledge.

Proud: Logic expects advanced knowledge of tricks and obscure interactions, such as using Combo Master, Dumbo, and other unusual methods to reach locations.

Minimal: Logic expects the bare minimum to get to locations; may require extensive grinding, beating fights with no tools, and performing very difficult or tedious tricks.

settings.label: Extra Shared Abilities
settings.description:
Determines if the item pool contains additional shared abilities, which can stack.

For example, equipping more High Jumps make you jump higher, more Super Glides makes you glide faster.

settings.label: Death Link
settings.description: If another player in the multiworld is KO'ed, so is Sora. The opposite is also true.

settings.label: Donald Death Link
settings.description: If Donald is KO'ed, so is Sora.

settings.label: Goofy Death Link
settings.description: If Goofy is KO'ed, so is Sora.

settings.label: Remote Items
settings.description:
Determines if KH1 items can be placed in KH1 locations in such a way that they are forced to be remote items.

Off: KH1 items placed in KH1 will all be placed locally and do not require client/server connection to obtain.

Allow: KH1 items placed in KH1 can be placed in locations that require client/server connection, but are otherwise placed locally.

Full: All locations in KH1 are handled by the client/server and nothing is placed locally.

If you are unsure what to choose - leave this as "Off".

settings.label: Shorten Go Mode
settings.description: Determines if the player should be warped to the credits after defeating Ansem 1 > Darkside > Ansem 2 in Homecoming.
